list.sql: SELECT p.id, p.student_id, s.name AS student_name, p.amount, p.payment_date FROM Payments p LEFT JOIN Students s ON s.id = p.student_id ORDER BY p.id DESC

get.sql: SELECT id, student_id, amount, payment_date FROM Payments WHERE id = %s

insert.sql: INSERT INTO Payments (student_id, amount, payment_date) VALUES (%s, %s, %s)

update.sql: UPDATE Payments SET student_id = %s, amount = %s, payment_date = %s WHERE id = %s

students_select.sql: SELECT id, name FROM Students ORDER BY name

student_lookup.sql: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.father_name, s.status, e.course_id, c.course_name, c.shift, e.start_date, e.end_date, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(c2.fee) FROM Enrollments e2 JOIN Courses c2 ON c2.id = e2.course_id WHERE e2.student_id = s.id), 0) AS total_fee, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(p.amount) FROM Payments p WHERE p.student_id = s.id), 0) AS total_paid, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(c3.fee) FROM Enrollments e3 JOIN Courses c3 ON c3.id = e3.course_id WHERE e3.student_id = s.id), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(p2.amount) FROM Payments p2 WHERE p2.student_id = s.id), 0) AS remaining_balance FROM Students s LEFT JOIN Enrollments e ON e.id = (SELECT e2.id FROM Enrollments e2 WHERE e2.student_id = s.id ORDER BY e2.id DESC LIMIT 1) LEFT JOIN Courses c ON c.id = e.course_id WHERE s.id = %s

balances.sql: SELECT x.id AS student_id, x.name AS student_name, x.total_fee, x.total_paid, (x.total_fee - x.total_paid) AS remaining FROM ( SELECT s.id, s.name, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.fee), 0) FROM Enrollments e JOIN Courses c ON c.id = e.course_id WHERE e.student_id = s.id) AS total_fee, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) FROM Payments p WHERE p.student_id = s.id) AS total_paid FROM Students s ) x ORDER BY remaining DESC, student_id

unpaid.sql: SELECT y.student_id, y.student_name, y.total_fee, y.total_paid, y.remaining FROM ( SELECT x.id AS student_id, x.name AS student_name, x.total_fee, x.total_paid, (x.total_fee - x.total_paid) AS remaining FROM ( SELECT s.id, s.name, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.fee), 0) FROM Enrollments e JOIN Courses c ON c.id = e.course_id WHERE e.student_id = s.id) AS total_fee, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) FROM Payments p WHERE p.student_id = s.id) AS total_paid FROM Students s ) x ) y WHERE y.remaining > 0 ORDER BY y.remaining DESC, y.student_id
